name: School Bus Svc-Manatee County

Yellow Pages lists 'School Bus Services of MA' at 2050 14th Ave E, Palmetto, FL 34221 (likely same operator at a related address; 'MA' here appears to mean Manatee). No SunBiz/OpenCorporates hit confirmed via available channels.

name: K I K School Bus Svc Corp
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). SunBiz entity 'K.I.K. SCHOOL BUS SERVICE CORP' doc# P17000026609, FL Profit Corporation, filed 2017-03-21, principal address 13213 SW 51st Street, Miramar, FL 33027 (last addr change 2022-08-09); last event REINSTATEMENT 2023-10-05; Registered Agent Rosa L. Quiroz. Yellow Pages listing 'K I K School Bus Svc Inc' (Pembroke Pines/Miramar area). SAFER wildcard searches for KIK SCHOOL BUS and K I K SCHOOL produced no carrier records; only similar but unrelated company 'A KIKO AND KIKA SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC' (Miami, USDOT 2374832). The fallback list address 18101 Pines Blvd #300 is likely a mail/UPS-Store style address; SunBiz shows residential principal address.

name: Reconnect Transportation Svc
fmcsa_address: La Plata, MD area (per FMCSA listing context)
notes: FMCSA SAFER carrier RECONNECT TRANSPORTATION SERVICES LLC, USDOT 3846103, located via Google index. SAFER snapshot returns 'The record matching USDOT Number = 3846103 is INACTIVE in the SAFER database' — operating authority/registration no longer active; detailed fields (power units, drivers, safety rating, address) not displayed by SAFER for inactive records. Maryland SDAT entity record could not be confirmed via available channels (SDAT/Business Express and OpenCorporates blocked or returned no direct match). Address per fallback list: 11501 Highland Farm Ct, La Plata, MD 20646; other Google results show separate 'B5 LOGISTICS LLC' at same address — suggests residential/home-based operator at that address.

name: Anf Transportation LLC
notes: no USDOT located after multiple SAFER wildcard searches (ANF, ANF TRANS, ANF TRANSPORTATION). Likely intrastate NEMT/wheelchair-van operator. Confirmed via FedLinks: 'A.N.F Transportation LLC', 723 Charette Rd, Philadelphia, PA 19115, phone (267) 266-1279, NAICS 485991 Special Needs Transportation, CAGE Code 92PU2, SAM UEI 049318523, described as providing medical transportation/non-emergency and wheelchair-accessible services.
